data.title: FSE Lifestyle Services Limited Announces Board Changes
data.description:
FSE Lifestyle Services Limited ( (HK:0331) ) has provided an update.

FSE Lifestyle Services Limited announced significant changes in its board composition at the conclusion of the 2025 AGM. Dr. Tong Yuk Lun, Paul will retire as an independent non-executive director, ceasing his roles in various committees, while Mr. Kwong Che Keung, Gordon will join the Remuneration Committee. Additionally, Mr. Martin Nicholas Hadaway, with extensive experience in the construction industry, has been nominated for election as an independent non-executive director, pending shareholder approval. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance and strategic direction.

More about FSE Lifestyle Services Limited

FSE Lifestyle Services Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating within the lifestyle services industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on providing a range of services, though specific products or market focus details are not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. Updates on Trading Resumption Progress
data.description:
Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3903) ) has shared an announcement.

Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. has announced a quarterly update on its progress towards resuming trading on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company has faced delays in publishing its 2024 Annual Results and 2025 Interim Results due to the need for an independent forensic investigation and internal control review. An independent investigation committee has been established to assess the impact of a previous incident on the company’s operations and financial position. The committee is tasked with conducting a forensic investigation and recommending remedial actions, with Now Consulting Limited appointed as the internal control consultant.

More about Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. Class H

Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited liability company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. The company operates in the financial industry, focusing on providing financial services and products. Its market focus includes various financial operations and services, primarily within the Chinese market.

data.title: FSE Lifestyle Services Reports Annual Financial Results with Decline in Revenue and Profit
data.description:
FSE Lifestyle Services Limited ( (HK:0331) ) just unveiled an update.

FSE Lifestyle Services Limited announced its annual financial results for the year ending June 30, 2025, reporting a slight decline in revenue and profit compared to the previous year. The company experienced a 3.4% decrease in revenue and a 9.6% drop in profit attributable to shareholders. Despite these declines, the board recommended a final dividend of HK18.5 cents per share, resulting in a total dividend distribution of HK39.6 cents per share for the year, reflecting a dividend payout ratio of 40.1%.

data.title: China In-Tech Limited Faces Revenue Decline in Haircare Segment Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited ( (HK:0464) ) has provided an update.

China In-Tech Limited reported a significant decrease in revenue for its electrical haircare appliances segment for the year ending March 31, 2025. The decline was attributed to reduced sales volumes of major products like hair dryers and straighteners, a drop in business from key customers, and economic challenges in European markets. Despite some growth in Spain and France, it was insufficient to offset losses in other regions. Additionally, changing consumer preferences towards more advanced technology in haircare appliances contributed to the revenue decline.

data.description:
Foshan Haitian Flavouring and Food Company Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3288) ) has issued an announcement.
